scripts.dev:local: pnpm build:shared && pnpm supabase:start && pnpm setup:local && pnpm -r --parallel --filter @member-manager/client --filter @member-manager/server run dev:local
scripts.gate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.test: pnpm build:shared && pnpm test:scripts && pnpm -r run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm build:shared && pnpm test:scripts && pnpm -r run test:coverage
scripts.lint: biome check api && pnpm -r run lint && pnpm check:filesize
